title: limonium parvum
intro: Limonium parvum, also known as sea lavender, is a low-growing, perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Limonium parvum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. Herbal preparations of Limonium parvum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
